testcase.name: test_thread_critical_local_not_context_dependent_in_sync_thread

failure.message: assert <_MainThread(MainThread, started 140090689791040)> == <Thread(asyncio_0, started 140090649511488)> + where <Thread(asyncio_0, started 140090649511488)> = <function current_thread at 0x7f69676c5120>() + where <function current_thread at 0x7f69676c5120> = threading.current_thread
